KPI Bluebook

Key Performance Indicators:

  • kpi flare recovery pct
  • SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m3
  • Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
  • Cooling Water Delta-T (°C
  • Yield Percentage (%
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF
  • On-Spec Rate (%
  • Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
  • Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day
  • OEE %
  • Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton
KPI Bluebook
  • Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton
  • View page source

Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm Edit
Description
  • Specific Catalyst Cost measures the cost of catalysts used in production
  • expressed in dollars per ton of product produced
  • This KPI provides insight into the efficiency and economic impact of catalyst usage in the manufacturing process
  • Cost of catalyst consumed per ton of product
  • used to monitor and optimize catalyst usage
Objective
  • The objective of tracking Specific Catalyst Cost is to optimize catalyst expenditures and enhance overall production profitability by identifying cost-effective catalyst options and minimizing waste
  • Control catalyst spend while maintaining performance and product quality
Formula

The formula for Specific Catalyst Cost is derived by dividing the total catalyst cost by the total product tons produced, ensuring that the cost is accurately reflected per unit of output.

$$ \mathrm{Catalyst\,Cost\,per\,Ton} = \frac{\mathrm{Catalyst\,Cost}}{\mathrm{Product\,Tons}} $$
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI is utilized in various performance assessments related to production efficiency
  • cost management
  • and operational effectiveness within the oil
  • gas
  • and petrochemical sectors
Input Measure
  • The input measures for this KPI include the total catalyst cost incurred during production and the total tons of product produced during the same period
  • Catalyst cost used and product tons over the measurement period
Unit of Measure The unit of measure for Specific Catalyst Cost is dollars per ton.
Reporting Source The reporting source for this KPI typically includes financial records, production reports, and inventory management systems that track catalyst usage and product output.
Comments Monitoring Specific Catalyst Cost is crucial for maintaining competitive pricing and ensuring that catalyst investments yield optimal returns in production efficiency.

Code Context

1:emphasize-lines: 1
2
3
4-- KPI: Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton)

– Formula: mathrm{Catalyst,Cost,per,Ton} = frac{mathrm{Catalyst,Cost}}{mathrm{Product,Tons}}

– T-SQL example KPI calculation SELECT CAST(catalyst_cost / NULLIF(product_tons, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS kpi_specific_catalyst_cost;
